_meta.purpose: Map LiteLLM model aliases to prompt-shape names. Used by packages/agent/src/prompt-shapes/selector.ts.
_meta.format: Exact aliases match first; wildcard patterns (suffix-*) match by prefix; falls back to default.
_meta.binding_rule: INHERITED_CONFIGS_REQUIRE_TASK_TYPE_AUDIT (decisions/2026-04-26-pilot-verdict-FAIL.md §6 — amendment v2 §5). Adding/changing a mapping requires empirical evidence in the corresponding shape's evidence_link.
_meta.evidence_link_for_qwen_default: Qwen aliases default to qwen-thinking because Stage 3 v6 + pilot 2026-04-26 (synthesis tasks) used thinking-on. For thinking-off use cases (judge calls, short structured outputs), callers should explicitly override to qwen-non-thinking.
